name: Google
tagline: Organize the world's information and make it universally accessible and useful.
summary: Google 由 Larry Page 与 Sergey Brin 于 1998 年在加州创立，最初只是一个名为 BackRub 的学术搜索引擎项目。如今它已成长为全球最大的科技公司之一，核心产品包括搜索、Gmail、YouTube、Android、Chrome、Maps、Cloud 和 AI（Gemini / Bard）。其品牌以四色 Logo、极简 sans-serif 字体与"做正确的事"价值观闻名，把"人人可访问的全球信息"作为长期使命。
summaryEn: Google was founded by Larry Page and Sergey Brin in 1998 in California, originally as an academic search project called BackRub. It has grown into one of the world's largest tech companies, with core products including Search, Gmail, YouTube, Android, Chrome, Maps, Cloud, and Gemini AI. The brand is famous for its four-color wordmark, minimalist sans-serif typography, and the 'do the right thing' ethos, anchored by the long-standing mission of making the world's information universally accessible.

logo.description: 由四个字母 G-o-o-g-l-e 组成，每个字母对应一种主色（蓝、红、黄、蓝、绿、红），笔画末端做圆切处理，整体圆润、亲和、童趣与现代并存。
logo.descriptionEn: A five-letter wordmark spelling G-o-o-g-l-e, each letter colored with one of four primaries (blue, red, yellow, blue, green, red). Strokes end in soft cuts, balancing friendliness, playfulness and modernity.
logo.construction: 字母基于几何圆与直线网格定制，几何中心对齐；四色分布遵循固定顺序（蓝-红-黄-蓝-绿-红），禁止乱序或改色。
logo.constructionEn: Letters are custom-built on a geometric grid of circles and straight strokes with shared centers. The color sequence (blue-red-yellow-blue-green-red) is fixed and must never be reordered.

typography.heading: Product Sans / Google Sans Display
typography.body: Google Sans Text / Roboto / Roboto Flex
typography.bodyEn: Google Sans Text / Roboto / Roboto Flex
typography.notes: 标题偏几何 sans、字面宽、重几何圆；正文用更紧凑、人机工学优化的 Roboto 系列，强调屏幕可读性。
typography.notesEn: Headings use a geometric sans with wide apertures and rounded geometry; body uses Roboto, a denser screen-optimized family built for long reading sessions.

photography.style: 明亮、高饱和、真实生活场景；产品页以纯净 UI 与渲染图为主
photography.styleEn: Bright, high-saturation real-life scenes; product pages rely on clean UI screenshots and crisp 3D renders
photography.lighting: 自然柔光为主，常带窗外天光，阴影柔和不压抑
photography.lightingEn: Soft natural daylight with window-like key light; gentle, non-oppressive shadows
photography.tone: 乐观、温暖、普惠；人群多元、肤色多样、设备多样
photography.toneEn: Optimistic, warm, inclusive; visibly diverse cast, skin tones and devices
photography.composition: 人物居中或三分构图，留白充足，主体清晰；产品图常用居中英雄式构图
photography.compositionEn: Centered or rule-of-thirds framing with generous negative space and a clear subject; product shots favor a centered hero composition

toneSummary: 谷歌对外的语气像一个永远好奇、耐心又可靠的朋友：把复杂的技术讲得人话化，用四色 logo 和节日 doodle 保持俏皮，但底层始终保持搜索巨头该有的权威与克制。
toneSummaryEn: Google's voice sounds like a curious, patient, reliable friend: it translates complex tech into plain language, keeps playfulness through its four-color logo and seasonal doodles, while maintaining the authority and restraint expected of the world's dominant search brand.
positioning: 全球默认的搜索引擎与日常数字基础设施，把"让信息对每个人都有用"作为长期承诺，在 AI 时代继续以 Gemini 把搜索升级为对话式智能助手。
positioningEn: The world's default search engine and everyday digital infrastructure, committed long-term to 'making information useful for everyone', now reinventing search for the AI era with Gemini as a conversational assistant.

targetUser.age: 18-55 岁，覆盖学生、白领、创作者与企业用户
targetUser.ageZh: 18-55 岁，覆盖学生、白领、创作者与企业用户
targetUser.identity: 全球互联网用户；学生、研究者、营销人、开发者、普通家庭
targetUser.identityZh: 全球互联网用户；学生、研究者、营销人、开发者、普通家庭
targetUser.pain: 想快速找到可靠答案，不想被广告或低质内容淹没；跨设备同步日常任务
targetUser.painZh: 想快速找到可靠答案，不想被广告或低质内容淹没；跨设备同步日常任务
targetUser.scene: 每天无数次：搜索、写邮件、导航、翻译、看视频、写文档、问 AI
targetUser.sceneZh: 每天无数次：搜索、写邮件、导航、翻译、看视频、写文档、问 AI

targetUserEn.age: 18-55, spanning students, professionals, creators, and enterprise users
targetUserEn.identity: Global internet users: students, researchers, marketers, developers, everyday households
targetUserEn.pain: Want fast, trustworthy answers without ad overload or low-quality content; need seamless cross-device syncing
targetUserEn.scene: Used countless times daily: search, email, navigation, translation, video, documents, asking AI

sellingPoints: 全球第一搜索引擎，索引万亿级网页，结果秒级返回
Gemini AI 把搜索升级为对话式智能助手，可直接生成总结与方案
一站式生态：Search / Gmail / Maps / YouTube / Drive / Android 跨设备无缝协同
Material You 与四色品牌系统让产品既统一又充满活力
持续投入普惠：免费工具、翻译、开放 Android、Pixel 硬件与开发者 API
sellingPointsEn: The world's #1 search engine, indexing trillions of pages with sub-second results
Gemini AI upgrades search into a conversational assistant that summarizes and problem-solves directly
One unified ecosystem: Search, Gmail, Maps, YouTube, Drive and Android sync seamlessly across devices
Material You design plus the four-color brand system keeps products consistent yet vibrant
Sustained commitment to accessibility: free tools, Translate, open-source Android, Pixel hardware and developer APIs
brandTakeaway: 把品牌色锁死在 4 个 hex，全公司任何触点只能从中取色
Logo 用定制 sans-serif 替代现成字体，建立长期视觉资产
每逢节日把首页 Logo 换成主题 Doodle，零成本引爆社交话题
把所有功能文案压到 5 个词以内，主按钮统一为单一形态
把设计系统写成 Material 公开文档，让全球开发者替你传播品牌
brandTakeawayEn: Lock the brand to 4 fixed hex codes and forbid anything outside them across every touchpoint
Replace stock fonts with a custom sans-serif to build a long-term visual asset
Swap the homepage logo for a themed Doodle on holidays to spark zero-cost social buzz
Trim every feature label to under 5 words and standardize one primary button shape
Publish your design system as open Material docs so global developers amplify your brand
